aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured conversational content and insufficient authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with detailed answers to common customer questions.
Enhance content with conversational language that aligns with AI search patterns.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Lack of engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for installation processes
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed business information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured, conversational content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'best window installation in Dublin, Ohio' and 'top-rated window and door companies near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Add an FAQ section with detailed answers to common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Leverage certifications, partnerships, and detailed project showcases to establish authority in the local market.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top answer for local window and door queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Broadview Windows is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured FAQ content and authority signals consistently rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies, including FAQ schema, conversational content, and enhanced GBP engagement, to position Broadview as the go-to expert in Dublin, Ohio.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Broadview Windows & Doors
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Columbus Window and Door Replacement Company
